context: Tests whether the agent implements the recovery link endpoint with correct redirect handling for expired/converted states, marks tokens as used, fires the correct analytics event, adds attribution parameters to recovery links, and captures a price snapshot at abandonment time.

checklist.name: Expired token redirect
checklist.description: Handler redirects to `/cart?expired=true` (or equivalent path containing 'expired') when the token is not found or has passed its expiry date

checklist.name: Converted cart redirect
checklist.description: Handler redirects to `/account/orders` (or equivalent order history path) when the cart status is already 'converted'

checklist.name: Session cart restoration
checklist.description: Handler restores the cart to the user's session (e.g. sets `req.session.cartId`) before redirecting

checklist.name: Token marked used
checklist.description: Handler calls a markUsed (or equivalent) method on the token record after a successful recovery

checklist.name: Analytics event fired
checklist.description: Handler fires an analytics tracking event named 'Cart Recovery Link Clicked' (or similar) including cartId and customerId

checklist.name: Checkout redirect
checklist.description: After restoring the session, handler redirects to `/checkout` (not homepage or cart page)

checklist.name: UTM parameters on recovery URL
checklist.description: Recovery URL (used in emails/messages) includes UTM parameters (utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign or similar) to track recovery traffic

checklist.name: recovered flag
checklist.description: Recovery URL or redirect destination includes a `recovered=true` query parameter (or equivalent flag) to distinguish recovery conversions

checklist.name: Snapshot price capture
checklist.description: snapshotCart captures item prices from the product at abandonment time (not a live/current lookup), storing them in the snapshot

checklist.name: Snapshot image capture
checklist.description: snapshotCart captures at least one product image URL per item in the snapshot

checklist.name: Snapshot total value
checklist.description: snapshotCart stores the cart's total value at time of snapshot

checklist.name: Snapshot persistence
checklist.description: snapshotCart persists the snapshot to the database (upsert or create on a snapshots table/collection)
